assertions.description: The goldfish PCB has 27 footprints versus 26 schematic components. The extra footprint is 'G*** LOGO' — a mechanical/artwork footprint that correctly has no schematic counterpart. Routing is complete (0 unrouted nets), DFM tier is 'standard' with no violations, and 2 copper zones are present (GND pour on both layers, VCC pour on B.Cu). The PCB component count (27) is a correct enumeration of all physical footprints, not an error.
